theme.description: Los Santos (GTA V) aesthetic: Gritty, urban, neon Los Angeles vibe with LSPD-noir darks and sunset/neon brights. High contrast, premium, cinematic gaming community look.

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60 border-b border-white/10. Sticky top.
surface_strategies.cards: Neumorphism mix: flat dark background (#12141A), 1px subtle border (border-white/5), hover: shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,59,48,0.15)] and subtle -translate-y-1.
surface_strategies.buttons: Tactile, sharp edges (rounded-sm or none). Primary buttons use #FF3B30 with drop-shadow glow.

layout_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-6 to p-12). Bento grid for dashboards/news.

animations.logo_animated: CSS Keyframes: pulse-glow (drop-shadow intensity variation) + continuous slow floating (translateY -10px to 0px).
animations.banner_animated: Parallax effect on scroll or slow continuous CSS background-position shifting (moving clouds/skyline behind characters).
animations.interactions: Hover states with light glow, scale up 1.02 on cards, active scaling 0.95 on buttons.
animations.page_transitions: Framer Motion fade-in and slide-up (y: 20 -> 0) for page content.

Landing (Login Gate).layout: Full-screen fixed Hero. Nothing else accessible without login. Moving banner background.
Landing (Login Gate).components: Animated LastV Logo (centered), 'KATIL' (Join) massive primary button linking to cfx.re/join/6myege6, Login/Register form block, Discord connect button.
Landing (Login Gate).visuals: Dark overlay (bg-black/60) over the Los Santos sunset background.

Ana Sayfa (Homepage).layout: Dashboard-style Bento Grid. Only accessible post-login.
Ana Sayfa (Homepage).components: Welcome Widget, Server Status (Online players, IP), Latest Announcements (Haberler) preview cards.

Kurallar (Rules).components: Accordion (Shadcn) or sidebar-navigated list of server RP rules.

Haberler (News).layout: Editorial masonry or standard card grid.
Haberler (News).components: Rich media cards with image, title, date, and excerpt.

Harita (Map).components: Interactive map viewer (Leaflet) or a high-res pan/zoom image with custom marker pins for key locations (LSPD, Pillbox, Mağaza).

Yetkili Ekip (Staff).layout: Tetris grid or standard grid profile cards.
Yetkili Ekip (Staff).components: Staff avatars, RP names, Discord tags, role badges (Kurucu, Admin, LSPD Şefi).

Mağaza (Shop).components: Car/Property cards with stats (Hız, Yol Tutuş), price (VIP credits), 'Satın Al' buttons. High-quality vehicle renders.

Galeri (Gallery).components: User-uploaded in-game screenshots. Lightbox for viewing. Upload photo CTA.

components_instructions.navigation: Sticky top nav. Visible only after login. Logo left, links center (Ana Sayfa, Kurallar, Haberler, Harita, Mağaza, Galeri), Profile/Discord right.
components_instructions.buttons: Shadcn Button heavily customized for 'Tactical/Gaming' look.
components_instructions.forms: Shadcn forms with customized dark inputs. bg-[#0F1115] border-white/10 focus:border-[#FF3B30].
components_instructions.testing: MANDATORY: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (e.g., 'katil-button', 'login-submit', 'nav-kurallar').

specific_requirements.auth_gate: Strictly enforced. No anonymous access past the landing page. Users must log in/register to access the application dashboard.
